headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://images.unsplash.com https://cdn.pixabay.com https://dynamic-media-cdn.tripadvisor.com https://media-cdn.tripadvisor.com https://www.tourismpg.com https://www.tourism.golden.bc.ca; media-src 'self' https://cdn.pixabay.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.resend.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
